overall.description: A first-person walk along a rocky coastal trail, beginning at an overlook with views of a turquoise beach and white sand, then ascending inland through reddish rock formations and scrub vegetation toward a landmark called Castle Rock. The footage captures the transition from open coastal views to enclosed rocky terrain under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal overlook with panoramic beach views

events.description: panning right reveals expansive white sand beach and turquoise ocean
beginning to walk forward along the rocky ridge

agents.ego_description: standing on a rocky outcrop overlooking the coastline, panning to take in the panoramic view of the beach and ocean

entered.detail: large reddish-brown rock outcrop with rough texture dominating the foreground
curved white sand beach along the shoreline with gentle waves lapping
clear blue-green ocean water extending to the horizon
dense green trees and scrub vegetation lining the coastline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky coastal overlook with a large red rock formation in the foreground. As the camera pans right, a stunning view of a white sand beach and turquoise ocean is revealed. The scene is bright and sunny with clear skies, and the camera begins to move forward along the rocky ridge, exploring the coastal terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path transitioning to inland terrain

events.description: turning left away from the beach view to head inland over the rocks
moving from open coastal overlook into denser rocky inland terrain

agents.ego_description: navigating over reddish rocks and boulders, moving away from the coastline and into the inland trail system

entered.detail: scattered reddish boulders and rock slabs forming a rough walking path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left away from the beach view and begins moving inland over the rocky terrain. The ocean and beach exit the frame as the path leads into denser rocky inland areas. The tall red rock formation moves to the right side as the camera navigates through the boulders, with coastal forest visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending rocky trail through coastal scrub

events.description: steady ascent up the rocky slope, navigating between boulders

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the rocky trail, navigating between boulders and through dense scrub vegetation

entered.detail: low green bushes and small trees lining both sides of the rocky path
occasional glimpses of the white beach visible through gaps in the vegetation

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes steeper and more enclosed as the camera ascends through dense coastal scrub. The path is rocky and uneven, with bushes and small trees lining both sides. Occasional glimpses of the distant beach are visible through vegetation gaps on the right, while the terrain continues to rise toward the inland hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: Castle Rock trail marker and upper rocky path

events.description: Castle Rock trail sign comes into view on the left side of the path
passing the trail marker and continuing the ascent

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the Castle Rock trail marker, continuing the steady climb up the rocky trail

entered.detail: wooden trail marker with 'CASTLE ROCK' text mounted on posts beside the path
larger rock outcrops and boulders visible at the top of the ascending trail

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wooden trail marker labeled 'CASTLE ROCK' on the left side of the path. After passing the sign, the ascent continues through the rocky terrain with larger rock formations visible ahead. The beach is no longer visible as the trail moves deeper into the scrub-covered hillside, with dense vegetation surrounding the narrow rocky path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open coastal overlook into an enclosed, ascending rocky trail. It begins atop a ridge with a large red rock formation, panning right to reveal a bright white sand beach and turquoise ocean before moving forward along the rocky terrain. As the camera turns left and heads inland, the coastal views fade from the frame and the landscape shifts toward denser boulders and distant forests. The scene then becomes steeper and more enclosed, winding through dense coastal scrub and uneven rocks where only occasional glimpses of the beach remain visible through gaps in the vegetation. Finally, the camera passes a wooden trail marker labeled Castle Rock and continues its ascent deeper into the hillside, where the path is fully surrounded by thick scrub and towering rock formations.
